$comment: dolt-watch baseline (the committed last-seen snapshot the radar diffs against). HARDENED per engineering-panel blocker B5: dolt-watch parses UNTRUSTED upstream text (release names, tool names) and then has write authority (opens issues, opens a state-update PR). Every value here carries a provenance stamp (verifiedAt ISO timestamp + evidenceUrl) so a maturity/version promotion in a PR diff must trace back to a matching run artifact, never a bare field edit. MINIMAL per plan decision 5: exactly ONE watched surface — the dolt-mcp release tag + its tool-list. Do NOT add a blog feed, status-page scrape, or any non-dolt-mcp repo here. A new watched surface lands ONLY when an adapter for that product exists.

dolt-mcp.toolsNote: 45-tool baseline transcribed from the v0.3.6 primitive_v1 toolset registry (mcp/pkg/toolsets/primitive_v1.go), in registration order. The names are the registered MCP tool strings (e.g. CreateDoltCommitToolName = "create_dolt_commit"); 'merge_dolt_branch_no_ff' is the one irregular name (constant MergeDoltBranchNoFastForwardToolName). The README says '~40 tools' loosely; the registry is authoritative. fetchCurrentState() re-fetches this list live each run and diffs against this baseline — a name added/removed here is what fires a tool-added / tool-removed signal.
